segments.text: if you get triggered by insults keep listening imagine a glass of water is kept in front of you and you accidentally bump into it and the water
spills over now imagine if there was no water in the cup no matter how many times you pump into it it would not
spill our emotions and our triggers are the same way if you feel triggered by something instead of putting the blame
on this other person look within why am I getting triggered usually we get triggered when we believe that some part
of what they said is true you will get hurt when there is something in you that
